description: A public information officer has requested a brief HTML report for the recent major earthquake (Magnitude > 7.0) stored in the SeisComP database. Extract the earthquake's parameters and create an HTML report at /home/ga/Documents/noto_report.html. The report must include the Event ID, UTC Origin Time, Japan Standard Time (JST) Origin Time (UTC + 9 hours), Magnitude, Latitude, Longitude, and a Google Maps link formatted as https://maps.google.com/?q=<lat>,<lon>. You may use SeisComP tools or query the database directly (mysql -u sysop -psysop seiscomp).
